title: Workflow feature support file column
excerpt:

posts.author: Adi_Bar (Adi Bar)
posts.cookedHtml:
In the Enterprise plan, the Workflow feature currently does not support the Files column.

For example, the basic action of moving an item from one board to another cannot be completed if the files attached to the item need to be transferred as well.

It would be highly beneficial if the Workflow feature could support the Files column.

Thank you for considering this request.
